description: An atomic unit of intent or insight. The primary entry point for new work.
A named abstraction or mental model that underpins multiple ideas.
A formal specification defining behaviour, contracts, or requirements.
Concrete code, configuration, or artefact that realises a spec.
A human or AI agent who contributes to the network.
A running software service or API that the network depends on.
A bounded context or subject area that groups related nodes.
An executable work unit assigned to an agent.
A digital artefact — file, image, dataset, credential.
An external news article or event ingested into the network.
A quantitative signal or metric observation.
A peer Coherence Network instance in the federation.
A navigational dimension or resonance axis.
A periodic signal or harmonic dimension.
A communication event between agents or systems.
